name: Cash N Gold
description_short: Greater Milwaukee Coin buys and sells gold, rare coins, and jewelry across Wisconsin. Founded in 1987, they're members of major numismatic organizations.
description_long:
Greater Milwaukee Coin was established in 1987 in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, and has built a reputation as a trusted dealer in precious metals and numismatic items. The company operates as a buyer and seller of gold, rare coins, and jewelry, serving the greater Milwaukee area with a physical location in Brookfield.

The company offers gold purchasing services for customers looking to sell gold items, rare coin acquisition and sales for collectors, jewelry buying, and antique coin dealing. They position themselves as a one-stop location for both selling precious metals and purchasing specialty coins. Their services cater to both casual sellers and serious collectors.

Greater Milwaukee Coin distinguishes itself through extensive professional affiliations, including membership in the American Numismatic Association, Professional Numismatic Guild, Better Business Bureau, PCGS, and NGC—among others. They actively participate in rare coin shows and conventions nationwide, indicating ongoing engagement with the numismatic community. This level of organizational involvement suggests expertise and commitment to industry standards.

The company operates limited hours (10am-5pm weekdays, 10am-2pm Saturdays) from a single Brookfield location. While their professional credentials are strong, potential customers should note the limited accessibility and geographic concentration of their physical presence. The website provides basic contact information but limited detail about pricing, appraisal processes, or specific terms for transactions.
pros: Member of American Numismatic Association and Professional Numismatic Guild, indicating professional credibility
BBB membership provides third-party accountability and dispute resolution
35+ years in business (founded 1987) demonstrates longevity and market trust
Active participation in rare coin shows and conventions nationwide
Dual services: both gold/jewelry buying and rare coin sales in one location
Membership in PCGS and NGC—major coin certification bodies
Multiple professional affiliations (Central States, Numismatists of Wisconsin, local coin clubs)
cons: Limited hours (weekdays 10am-5pm, Saturdays 10am-2pm only) restrict access
Single physical location in Brookfield limits geographic accessibility for broader Wisconsin market
Website provides no pricing information, appraisal process details, or transaction terms
No mention of authentication guarantees, return policies, or buyer protections
Minimal online presence or ability to conduct transactions remotely
best_for: Collectors and enthusiasts seeking to buy rare coins and numismatic items from a credentialed dealer
Milwaukee-area residents looking to sell gold, jewelry, or coins to an established local buyer
Serious numismatists requiring professional-grade coins certified by PCGS or NGC
diagnosis: Greater Milwaukee Coin is best suited for established coin collectors and Milwaukee-area residents with precious metals or rare coins to sell, or collectors seeking authenticated coins. The main caveat is limited accessibility—single location, restricted hours, and no online transaction capability make them inconvenient for most Wisconsin consumers outside Brookfield.
services: Gold buying and purchasing from customers
Coins certified through PCGS and NGC
Attendance at regional and national coin shows for inventory acquisition
